home.about.title: About Me
home.about.text: Frontend Software Engineer with over 10 years of experience designing, building, and optimizing web applications for high-scale digital platforms across Europe and Latin America. Specialized in Angular, Vue, and TypeScript, with a strong focus on performance, security, and developer experience.

casinocraftz.title: Casinocraftz
casinocraftz.subtitle: A browser-first educational simulation for game math literacy.
casinocraftz.disclaimer.zeroRisk: No gambling and no real-money wagering. This is an educational sandbox.
lobby.balance.label: AI Essence
lobby.deposit.title: Deposit AI Essence
lobby.deposit.educational: This is fake money. Real casinos use this exact UI to make deposits feel frictionless and guilt-free.
lobby.game.slots.label: Slots Classic
lobby.game.slots.description: 3-reel deterministic slots with live house edge telemetry.
lobby.game.blackjack.label: Blackjack
lobby.game.blackjack.description: Card counting mechanics and dealer probability exposed.
lobby.analyzerPanel.label: ANALYZER PANEL
lobby.chambers.label: SIMULATION CHAMBERS
lobby.game.roulette.label: Roulette
lobby.game.roulette.description: Zero-pockets, probability math, and the gambler's fallacy deconstructed.
lobby.chamber.slots.summary: Deterministic reel chamber calibrated for house-edge literacy drills.
lobby.chamber.blackjack.summary: Dealer probability and card counting telemetry staged for upcoming unlock.
lobby.chamber.roulette.summary: Wheel bias and gambler's fallacy probes reserved for a locked chamber.
lobby.telemetry.label: LIVE TELEMETRY
lobby.telemetry.houseEdge.explain: The house edge is the mathematical advantage the casino holds on every bet. A 5.6% edge means the house earns 5.6 cents for every dollar wagered over time.
lobby.telemetry.signal.explain: Signal tracks the RNG output pattern across recent spins. Animated bars visualise entropy — they carry no predictive value.
lobby.telemetry.impulse.explain: Impulse counts simulated bets per minute and reflects session pacing. Higher impulse increases exposure to the house edge per unit of time.

tutorial.curriculum.title: Curriculum Shell
tutorial.curriculum.subtitle: Lesson one is active now. The next psychology lessons stay visible but locked until their deterministic rollout phase.
tutorial.curriculum.boundedRule: Lessons unlock only by finishing the previous lesson. No spending, rewards, or grind loops.
tutorial.essence.label: AI Essence
tutorial.lesson.houseEdge.label: Lesson 01: House Edge
tutorial.lesson.houseEdge.description: Learn why the machine keeps a mathematical advantage over time.
tutorial.lesson.nearMiss.label: Lesson 02: Near Miss
tutorial.lesson.nearMiss.description: Learn how almost-winning outcomes distort perception without changing the odds.
tutorial.lesson.sensoryConditioning.desc: Learn how lights, sounds, and pacing reinforce attention without changing outcomes.
tutorial.causality.probabilityReveal: The probability-reveal step is unlocked after observing 3 complete spins. You've reached that threshold.
tutorial.causality.nearMissReveal: The near-miss reveal unlocks after observing 2 spins in lesson two. Observation changes the explanation, not the odds.
tutorial.causality.sensoryReveal: The sensory-conditioning reveal unlocks after observing 2 spins in lesson three. Feedback intensity changes perception, not outcomes.
cards.probabilitySeer.label: Probability Seer
cards.probabilitySeer.description: Reveals per-symbol probability percentages on the reel display.
cards.dopamineDampener.label: Dopamine Dampener
cards.dopamineDampener.description: Suppresses win-celebration atmosphere cues so you can study outcomes analytically.
cards.houseEdge.label: House Edge
cards.houseEdge.description: Shows the house edge percentage as a persistent HUD overlay.

slots.gameplay.panel.title: Core Loop Economy
slots.education.houseEdgeCopy: Each spin is tuned so expected return stays below total spend over time.
slots.education.manipulationCue: Cue: lights and near-win pacing can feel like control, even when odds stay fixed.
